name: Skeleton Archer Squad
description: Undead archers take position in the ruins, their arrows aimed at intruders!

dungeon_l2_encounter_1_complete.display_message: The skeletal archers fall, their bones clattering to the ground. The corridor ahead is clear.

special_rules.description: Skeletons prioritize ranged attacks, take cover behind pillars

ambient_description: Skeletal archers stand in formation, arrows nocked and ready. Their hollow eyes track your every movement.
victory_description: The skeletal archers collapse, their bows clattering beside them. The deeper ruins await.
defeat_description: You retreat from the deadly arrows. The skeletal archers return to their eternal vigil.
